case_title: WENDY LUO ET AL VS. KYI AUNG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CORRECT MAILING ADDRESS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUNG, KYI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LUO, WENDY WANG, LILI AS TO DEFENDANT AUNG, KYI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 <WAIVED>) SERVED DEC-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUNG, KYI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF WENDY LUO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LILI WANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WENDY LUO, DAUGHTER. DEFENDANT KYI AUNG IS PRESENT. MS. LUO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUO, WENDY WANG, LILI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUNG, KYI $3,540.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.00, DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PROVIDE INVOICES AND/OR RECEIPTS AFTER THE WORK/REPAIRS WERE PERFORMED. ADDITIONALLY, THE REASONS FOR DEDUCTIONS WERE BEYOND WEAR/TEAR AND EXCESSIVE. THE BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT IS $1770. PENALTY FOR VIOLATING CCC 1950(G) IS $1770.00 TOTAL OWED TO THE PLAINTIFF IS $3540. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
